creator: cnehren+freebsd-bugs@pobox.com
text: Revision 358951 of ports/graphics/libdmtx/Makefile changed the libMagickWand sofile to libMagickWand.so.  The ImageMagick port does not provide this file (http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/graphics/ImageMagick/pkg-plist?view=markup#l424), and I'm not sure how Dmitry determined that it does.  I don't see anything in UPDATING about this, either.
